{{Quote|I am Cakhmaim, warrior of the clan Eikh'mir. I lead the honor guard of the ''Mal'ary'ush''. To your service and protection we commit ourselves and our lives.|Cakhmaim, to Leia Organa Solo|<ref name="The Last Command">''[[The Last Command]]''</ref>}}
'''Cakhmaim''', [[clan Eikh'mir]], was a [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] warrior, and the head of [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo's]] honor guard. He served as chief bodyguard of Leia and her [[Solo family/Legends|family]] for over 31 years, beginning at the [[Thrawn campaign|Thrawn crisis]] and throughout the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] and [[Swarm War]], until both he and [[Meewalh]] were [[Battle of Hapes (Second Galactic Civil War)|killed]] when fired upon by the [[Galactic Alliance Guard]] [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Anakin Solo (starship)|''Anakin Solo'']] during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]]—on orders which came from [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]], whom Cakhmaim had once guarded as a newborn.
